summary: Iteration 68 - Wealth Command v7.4.0 Complete Testing. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Verified Feedback & Learning System, Enhanced Execution Engine, and Real-Time Data Layer. Frontend pages /feedback-analytics and /realtime-data load correctly. Health endpoint returns v7.4.0 with 32 capabilities including feedback_loop section.

issues: Compliance modal appears on page load - user must dismiss it to see content

critical_code_review_comments: All v7.4.0 features implemented correctly and passing tests
Feedback & Learning System has 6 endpoints working with in-memory storage
Enhanced Execution Engine properly closes the Insight→Decision→Action→Execution loop
Real-Time Data Layer provides single source of truth for portfolio data
Health endpoint correctly reports version 7.4.0 with 32 capabilities
Navigation in Layout.jsx correctly includes new pages under AI Tools and Execution sections
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all APIs use in-memory demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified all v7.4.0 features. Three new route modules: feedback_learning.py (6 endpoints), execution_engine_enhanced.py (5 endpoints), realtime_data_layer.py (8+ endpoints). Two new frontend pages: FeedbackAnalytics.jsx and RealtimeDataDashboard.jsx. All data is MOCKED/DEMO stored in-memory. Navigation links exist in Adviser mode under AI Tools (Learning Analytics) and Execution (Real-Time Data).

mocked_apis.Feedback_Learning: MOCKED - In-memory storage for feedback, outcomes, preferences, recommendations
mocked_apis.Execution_Engine: MOCKED - In-memory execution log, simulated trade execution
mocked_apis.Realtime_Data_Layer: MOCKED - Demo portfolios (3 clients: Wheeler, Chen, Thompson), demo market data (10 symbols), demo transactions

features_verified.loop_status: WORKING - GET /api/execution-engine/loop-status shows all 7 components active
features_verified.execute_action: WORKING - POST /api/execution-engine/execute completes full loop with CRM and outcome capture
features_verified.execution_metrics: WORKING - GET /api/execution-engine/metrics returns metrics by action type
features_verified.data_status: WORKING - GET /api/realtime-data/status returns operational in demo mode

features_verified.market_data: WORKING - GET /api/realtime-data/market-data returns 10 symbols (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, etc.)
features_verified.drift_analysis: WORKING - GET /api/realtime-data/insights/drift returns portfolios needing rebalance
features_verified.execute_trade: WORKING - POST /api/realtime-data/execute-trade updates portfolio in real-time
